name: Lobster-Shrimp Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed Cream of Shrimp Soup, undiluted
1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook celery and onion in butter until tender.
2. Add soups, milk, and cream.
3. Stir in lobster, sherry, and parsley.
4. Heat until very hot. Do not boil.
5. Serves 8
